# Profile

## Role

Ada Kovács — product lead at a 60-person B2B SaaS company in Budapest.

## Background

Ten years in product, previously a UX researcher. Comfortable reading data
but not a programmer.

## Context

Reports to the VP of Product; runs a squad of six engineers and one designer.
